auth.forbidden: Current account has no KB permission
kb.fileNameDuplicated: A document with the same name already exists in this collection
kb.fileExtUnsupported: Unsupported extension, only md/txt/docx/xlsx/pdf are allowed
kb.uploadLimitExceeded: File count or size exceeds upload limits
kb.contentSha256Invalid: contentSha256 must be a 64-character lowercase hex string
kb.presignRequiresObjectStorage: Presigned direct upload requires object storage (MinIO/S3); enable KB_OBJECT_STORAGE_*
kb.objectStorageConfigMissing: Object storage is misconfigured (endpoint, bucket, or credentials missing)
kb.presignObjectKeyInvalid: objectKey is invalid or does not belong to this collection
kb.presignObjectMissing: Uploaded object not found; confirm PUT succeeded and URL has not expired
kb.presignSizeMismatch: Uploaded object size does not match declared fileSize
kb.storageUriNotAllowed: Public ingest endpoint does not allow client-provided storageUri
kb.fileBusyProcessing: The file is queued or processing. Delete and rebuild are temporarily unavailable
kb.job.abortedSoftDeleted: The file was deleted; the ingest job was aborted
kb.dedupReused: Duplicate content detected, existing parsed result reused
kb.recycleRestoreMatch: A deleted file with the same name and content exists in the recycle bin; you can restore it instead of uploading again
kb.tagLengthExceeded: Single tag length cannot exceed 10 characters
kb.parser.docxUnavailable: DOCX parser is unavailable, please install dependency
kb.parser.documentServiceUnavailable: Python document service is missing or unreachable (KB_DOCUMENT_SERVICE_URL)
kb.parser.pdfUnavailable: PDF parser is unavailable, please install dependency
kb.recycle.collectionNotRestored: Cannot restore file while its collection is not restored
kb.onlyofficeDisabled: OnlyOffice is not configured (check ONLYOFFICE_* environment variables)
kb.onlyofficeUnsupportedType: This file type is not supported for OnlyOffice
kb.retrievalTest.chatModelNotConfigured: KB_RETRIEVAL_TEST_CHAT_MODEL is not set; retrieval test generation is unavailable
kb.retrievalTest.chatEmbeddingNotConfigu: EMBEDDING_BASE_URL or EMBEDDING_API_KEY is missing; cannot call chat API
kb.retrievalTest.noCandidates: No reranked hits; cannot generate an answer
